scopes.regions: TH-50 TH-51 TH-52 TH-55 TH-56 TH-57 TH-58
scopes.region_names: Chiang Mai, Lamphun, Lampang, Nan, Phayao, Chiang Rai, Mae Hong Son

scopes.what: Chiang Mai is a bbox around city + inner suburbs, NOT the whole changwat
scopes.note: Temples in outer CM districts are OUT OF SCOPE, not missing

scopes.what: Structures inside one compound tagged as separate places of worship in OSM
scopes.note: A bare Chedi or Viharn; flagged in the near-duplicate queue, never auto-merged

scopes.what: Temples that exist but are absent from OpenStreetMap at any tagging
scopes.note: Wat Si Don Mun Saraphi (Khruba Noi): zero matches for the name among place_of_worship in all Chiang Mai province, checked 2026-07-22

scopes.what: City pillars, sunken cities, sacred and prehistoric caves, mosques, churches, monumental Buddha images
scopes.method: Wikidata by class, 250km radius filtered to the Lanna bbox

scopes.what: San phra phum, san chao thi and kin - the household sacred landscape
scopes.note: OSM Thailand 2026-07-22: 23825 wats but 20 named san phra phum and 2 san chao thi. No crawl closes this.

scopes.what: Ho phi (Laos), nat sin (Myanmar), neak ta (Cambodia) and neighbours
scopes.note: NOT translations of each other; each needs its own vocabulary entry and sources
